content_body: I had my 40th birthday in this cabin, and we had a great time! I will never forget this wonderful experience, and my only regret is that we couldn't stay longer. The cabin is beautiful, and the views are amazing! Unfortunately, the weather did not allow us to explore the great outdoors, but we will be back. I am so impressed with this cabin, and I would recommend this house in a heartbeat! Thank you for allowing us to stay, and I look forward to our return!
title: So Impressed with This Cabin!
